banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Haruto Tanaka, a Japanese passport holder (Japan is on the ETA-eligible passport list) applying for himself through the AustralianETA app for a two-week visit to see a friend in Sydney. He has no criminal record, no health-requirement failures, no outstanding debt to the Australian Government, holds only one passport, and has never used another name. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to apply: a Japanese passport holder who intends only a temporary family/friend visit, meets the health requirement, has no criminal conviction or domestic violence history, and owes no outstanding debt to the Australian Government.

reasons.requirement: Must intend to stay temporarily and obey visa conditions
Must have no criminal conviction or domestic violence history to remain ETA-eligible (otherwise must apply for a Visitor subclass 600 visa)
Must have no outstanding debt to the Australian Government, or have arranged to pay it back
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'Have paid back debt to the Australian Government'

collectedValues.label: Do you intend to stay in Australia only temporarily...?
Do you meet Australia's health requirement for this visa?
Do you have any criminal conviction, in any country, or any domestic violence history?
If you or any family member owes the Australian Government money, has it been paid back or arranged to be paid back?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'Have paid back debt to the Australian Government'

collectedValues.label: Date of birth
collectedValues.sourceRef: Step by step — passport chip scan

collectedValues.label: Do you hold a passport in your name from another country?
Do you already hold an existing Australian visa?
Are you, or have you ever been, known by any other name?
Intended contact address for your stay in Australia
collectedValues.value: Staying with a friend, 22 Wattle Street, Bondi, NSW 2026, Australia

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: Japanese passports carry a National ID number on the chip; the app does not prompt for manual entry
no second address line for this applicant's address

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (au/homeaffairs/eta-application-601). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Department of Home Affairs or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and submit the actual application themselves through the AustralianETA app on their own NFC-enabled mobile device before this application can proceed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
